rationale: Acting on Review 1's Is- prefix findings (naming AffineAlgGroup/ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup as Is* to match IsUnipotent, IsAlgClosed etc. already used in the file and Mathlib) plus the AlgPoints signature reservation produces measurably more consistent naming than the as-is state approved by Review 2; the True placeholders and lemma name are weaker but still material naming issues grounded in the exact diff. Review 2's 'standard terminology' claim is unsupported by the shown code.
